docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. (SEE IMAGE FOR DESCISION)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA JOH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROCKEFELLER PHILANTHROPY ADVISORS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,479.93 FILED BY JOH, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT ROCKEFELLER PHILANTHROPY ADVISORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOH, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCKEFELLER PHILANTHROPY ADVISORS, INC. $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,795.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
